candidate_definition_hints.text: > This is the official implementation of **CTX-vec2wav** vocoder in the AAAI-2024 paper [UniCATS: A Unified Context-Aware Text-to-Speech Framework with Contextual VQ-Diffusion and Vocoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.07547).
